subject: [PATCH 8/8] mm/vmstat, memcontrol: Track ZSWAP_B, ZSWAPPED_B per-memcg-lruvec

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the inaccuracy of NR_ZSWAPPED_B due to its coarse granularity and suggested that it should be kept accurate. However, acknowledged that invasive changes across all vmstat infrastructure would be required to fix this.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch series updates the tracking of ZSWAP_B and ZSWAPPED_B statistics to be per-memcg-lruvec, allowing for more accurate accounting of compressed object charges. The changes involve moving these statistics from node stats to memcg-lruvec stats and decoupling their updates.
